title: Engineering Foundation
description: Started exploring electronics, Arduino programming, embedded systems, and DIY engineering by building small Tier-2 and Tier-3 projects to understand practical hardware development.

title: School Engineering Projects
description: Completed multiple Tier-2 engineering projects including CNC Plotter, Thermoelectric Refrigerator, Water-Based Cooling Refrigerator, MP3 Speaker, BLE Bug, and other embedded hardware prototypes while developing practical experience in electronics and mechanical fabrication.

title: University & Tier-1 Projects
description: Joined VIT AP University and transitioned from educational prototypes to large-scale product engineering, beginning the development of patent-oriented Tier-1 projects with complete hardware and software ecosystems.

title: System Architecture & Product Development
description: Designed complete embedded hardware architectures, firmware, AI-assisted software platforms, mobile applications, and modular engineering workflows while expanding multiple Tier-1 projects into end-to-end engineering systems.

title: Research & Patent-Oriented Development
description: Expanded projects into research-oriented and patent-oriented engineering work through technical documentation, invention drafting, system validation, portfolio development, and preparation for future publications and intellectual property filings.

title: Engineering Portfolio & Professional Presence
description: Established a complete engineering portfolio, technical documentation, professional profiles, and project ecosystem while preparing products for research publications, collaborations, internships, startup opportunities, and future commercialization.
